faq.title: We answer
faq.description: The most common questions from our patients before their consultation.

recovery.question: How long does recovery take?
recovery.answer: Recovery time varies depending on the procedure. Generally, facial procedures require 1-2 weeks, while body surgeries may need 2-4 weeks before resuming normal activities.

permanent.question: Are the results permanent?
permanent.answer: Most surgical procedures offer lasting results. However, factors such as natural aging, weight changes, and lifestyle can affect long-term results.

anesthesia.question: What type of anesthesia is used?
anesthesia.answer: Depending on the procedure, we use local anesthesia, sedation, or general anesthesia. Dr. Sinchi will evaluate your particular case and recommend the safest and most comfortable option.

financing.question: Do you offer financing?
financing.answer: Yes, we have flexible financing options so you can proceed with your procedure. Contact our team to learn about available plans.

finalResults.question: When can I see the final results?
finalResults.answer: Initial results are visible within the first few weeks, but the final result is appreciated 3-6 months after the procedure, once swelling has completely subsided.

facial.title: Facial Plastic Surgery
facial.description: Procedures designed to enhance your natural beauty and correct imperfections with advanced techniques and harmonious results.

blepharoplasty.name: Blepharoplasty
blepharoplasty.description: Eyelid rejuvenation by removing excess skin and bags.

lifting.name: Lifting / Fox-eyes
lifting.description: Brow lift, Fox-eyes, frontal, facial and cervical lifting.

rhinoplasty.name: Rhinoplasty
rhinoplasty.description: Aesthetic and functional correction of the nose to achieve facial harmony.

facialFillers.name: Facial Fillers
facialFillers.description: Restore volume with autologous fat, hyaluronic acid or implants.

otoplasty.name: Otoplasty
otoplasty.description: Correction of prominent ears, reduction or reconstruction.

moleRemoval.description: Safe removal of moles and skin lesions with pathological analysis.

mentoplasty.description: Chin augmentation or reduction to balance the facial profile.

chinLipo.description: Removal of submental fat to define the neck contour.

bichectomy.name: Bichectomy

cheekAugmentation.description: Enhance your cheekbones with autologous fat or silicone implants.

liposculpture.description: Remove localized fat and shape your figure with high-definition techniques.

gluteoplasty.name: Gluteoplasty

intro.description: Reconstructive surgery goes beyond appearance. Our goal is to restore function, relieve pain, and restore confidence to patients who have suffered trauma, illness, or conditions affecting their physical and emotional well-being.

doctorPage.fullBio: Dr. Manuel Sinchi is a distinguished plastic surgeon trained at the best medical institutions in Peru and abroad. His approach combines advanced surgical techniques with deep respect for each patient's natural anatomy, always seeking harmonious results that enhance individual beauty.
doctorPage.cvIntroduction: With over a decade dedicated to plastic surgery, reconstructive surgery and aesthetic medicine, Dr. Manuel Sinchi has built a solid professional career backed by excellent training both in Peru and at prestigious international centers. His commitment to constant updating and adoption of cutting-edge techniques allows him to offer his patients the highest standards of quality and safety.

g1.question: What is Dr. Manuel Sinchi's experience?
g1.answer: Dr. Manuel Sinchi has over 15 years of experience in plastic, aesthetic, and reconstructive surgery. He is a board-certified surgeon by the Medical College of Peru, with training at the best institutions in the country and international training in Sweden, United States, Argentina, Uruguay, Mexico, and Bolivia. He has performed more than 5,000 successful procedures.

g2.question: Where are the procedures performed?
g2.answer: Surgical procedures are performed at authorized and certified clinics in Lima, which meet all safety standards and have state-of-the-art equipment. Consultations and non-invasive treatments are performed at our office in Miraflores.

g3.question: Do you treat patients from abroad?
g3.answer: Yes, we treat international patients. We offer prior virtual consultations to evaluate your case and coordinate the entire process including accommodation recommendations near the clinic. The team provides complete support during your stay in Lima.

g4.question: How can I schedule a consultation?
g4.answer: You can schedule your consultation in three ways: 1) Through our website in the 'Book' section, 2) Via WhatsApp at 961 360 074, or 3) By calling the same number directly. In-person consultations are held in Miraflores, and we also offer virtual consultations.

p1.question: What procedures does Dr. Sinchi offer?
p1.answer:
We offer a wide range of procedures:

• Facial Surgery: Rhinoplasty, blepharoplasty, facelift, mentoplasty, otoplasty, bichectomy.
• Body Surgery: Liposculpture, tummy tuck, breast augmentation, mastopexy, gluteoplasty, mommy makeover.
• Aesthetic Medicine: Botox, hyaluronic acid, biostimulators, facial PRP.
• Reconstructive Surgery: Breast reconstruction, scar treatment, biopolymer removal.

p2.question: How long does a typical surgery take?
p2.answer:
Duration varies by procedure:

• Minor facial procedures (botox, fillers): 15-30 minutes
• Blepharoplasty: 1-2 hours
• Rhinoplasty: 2-3 hours
• Liposculpture: 2-4 hours
• Tummy tuck: 2-4 hours
• Breast augmentation: 1-2 hours
• Mommy Makeover: 4-6 hours

Dr. Sinchi will explain specific times during your consultation.

p3.question: What type of anesthesia is used?
p3.answer:
The type of anesthesia depends on the procedure:

• Local anesthesia: For minor procedures like fillers, botox, mole removal.
• Sedation: For intermediate procedures requiring greater comfort.
• General anesthesia: For major surgeries like rhinoplasty, liposculpture, tummy tuck, breast augmentation.

All procedures with anesthesia are performed with a certified anesthesiologist present.

p4.question: Are the results permanent?
p4.answer:
It depends on the procedure:

• Permanent: Rhinoplasty, blepharoplasty, otoplasty, liposculpture (removed fat cells don't return), breast implants.
• Semi-permanent: Facelift (lasts 7-10 years), tummy tuck.
• Temporary: Botox (4-6 months), hyaluronic acid (12-18 months), biostimulators (up to 2 years).

Natural aging continues, but surgical results are long-lasting.

p5.question: Can I combine multiple procedures?
p5.answer:
Yes, it's possible and often recommended to combine procedures for more harmonious results and reduced total recovery time. Popular combinations include:

• Rhinoplasty + mentoplasty (profiloplasty)
• Liposculpture + tummy tuck
• Mommy Makeover (breasts + abdomen + lipo)
• Bichectomy + chin lipo

Dr. Sinchi will evaluate if you're a candidate for combined procedures.

r1.question: How long is the recovery time?
r1.answer:
Recovery times vary:

• Non-invasive procedures (botox, fillers): No recovery, immediate normal activities.
• Blepharoplasty: 5-7 days for normal activities.
• Rhinoplasty: 7-10 days, nasal splint for 1 week.
• Liposculpture: 7-14 days, wearing compression garment for 4-6 weeks.
• Tummy tuck: 14-21 days, relative rest for 4-6 weeks.
• Breast augmentation: 7-14 days, exercise after 4-6 weeks.

Each patient is different and you'll receive personalized instructions.

r2.question: Will I have a lot of pain after surgery?
r2.answer:
Postoperative pain is manageable with prescribed medication. Most patients describe more discomfort than intense pain. We provide:

• Appropriate pain medication for your procedure
• Anti-inflammatories to reduce swelling
• Clear postoperative care instructions
• 24/7 emergency contact line

Pain is usually greater in the first 2-3 days and gradually decreases.

r3.question: When can I return to work?
r3.answer:
It depends on the type of work and procedure:

• Office work:
  - Minor procedures: 1-2 days
  - Facial surgeries: 5-7 days
  - Body surgeries: 10-14 days

• Physical work:
  - Minor procedures: 3-5 days
  - Facial surgeries: 2 weeks
  - Body surgeries: 4-6 weeks

It's important to follow recommendations for optimal recovery.

r4.question: When will I see the final results?
r4.answer:
Results evolve over time:

• Initial results: Visible from the first weeks.
• Swelling reduction: 70% in the first month, 90% at 3 months.
• Final results:
  - Facial procedures: 3-6 months
  - Liposculpture: 3-6 months
  - Tummy tuck: 6-12 months
  - Breast augmentation: 3-6 months
  - Rhinoplasty: 12 months (nose continues refining)

Patience is key to appreciate the complete results.

s1.question: How safe is plastic surgery?
s1.answer:
Plastic surgery is very safe when performed by a certified surgeon in authorized facilities. Our safety standards include:

• Complete preoperative evaluation
• Laboratory and cardiac exams
• Certified operating rooms with modern equipment
• Certified anesthesiologists
• Strict sterilization protocols
• Close postoperative follow-up

The rate of serious complications is less than 1% in well-selected patients.

s2.question: Am I a candidate for plastic surgery?
s2.answer:
Ideal candidates generally:

• Are in good overall health
• Don't smoke or can quit 4 weeks before/after
• Have realistic expectations
• Maintain a stable weight
• Don't have uncontrolled medical conditions

During the consultation, Dr. Sinchi will evaluate your medical history, perform a physical exam, and determine if you're a suitable candidate for the desired procedure.

s3.question: What happens if I have an emergency after surgery?
s3.answer:
Your safety is our priority. We have:

• 24/7 emergency line from Dr. Sinchi
• Clear warning sign instructions
• Coordination with clinics for immediate care if necessary
• Scheduled follow-up appointments

The team is available to answer any concerns during your recovery.

s4.question: Will there be visible scars?
s4.answer:
Dr. Sinchi uses techniques that minimize scarring:

• Incisions in natural folds or hidden areas
• High-quality sutures
• Multi-layer closure techniques
• Scar care instructions

Scars mature and fade over time (12-18 months). We offer additional treatments if needed such as laser or injections to optimize healing.

c1.question: How much does a consultation cost?
c1.answer:
The evaluation consultation has a cost that includes:

• Complete evaluation of your case
• Detailed physical examination
• Explanation of recommended procedure
• Results simulation (when applicable)
• Personalized treatment plan
• Detailed quote

The consultation cost can be applied to the procedure if you decide to proceed. Contact us to learn the current price.

c2.question: Do you offer financing?
c2.answer:
Yes, we understand that investing in your wellbeing is important. We offer:

• Payment plans in installments
• Agreements with financial institutions
• Discounts for cash payment
• Special promotions on certain dates

During your consultation, the administrative team will explain all available financing options.

c3.question: What does the surgery price include?
c3.answer:
Our quotes are transparent and include:

• Surgeon's fees
• Anesthesiologist's fees
• Operating room and recovery room use
• Medical materials and supplies
• Compression garments (when applicable)
• Medications for the first days
• Postoperative follow-up appointments

There are no hidden costs. Any additional elements are communicated in advance.

c4.question: Can I get a quote without an in-person consultation?
c4.answer:
We can give you an indicative price range via WhatsApp or email, but for an accurate quote we need:

• In-person or virtual evaluation
• Understanding your specific goals
• Evaluating your anatomy and current condition
• Determining the best approach for your case

Each patient is unique, and the final quote depends on your particular case's complexity.

a1.question: How far in advance should I schedule my surgery?
a1.answer:
We recommend:

• Initial consultation: Schedule 1-2 weeks in advance
• Surgery: Schedule 2-4 weeks in advance after consultation
• Preoperative exams: Complete 1-2 weeks before surgery

For specific dates (vacations, events), we recommend planning 2-3 months in advance considering recovery time.

a2.question: What should I bring to my first consultation?
a2.answer:
For your first consultation, we recommend bringing:

• ID document
• List of medications you take
• History of previous surgeries
• Recent medical exams (if you have them)
• Reference photos of results you like
• List of questions you want to ask

Come in comfortable clothing, especially if the evaluation is for body procedures.

a3.question: Can I reschedule or cancel my appointment?
a3.answer:
Yes, we understand that unforeseen circumstances can arise:

• Rescheduling: Let us know at least 24 hours in advance
• Consultation cancellation: No charge if you notify in advance
• Surgery cancellation: Policies vary depending on advance notice

We ask that you communicate as soon as possible so we can offer the slot to another patient. Contact us via WhatsApp or phone for any changes.
